_comment: SYNTHETIC illustrative example, not live data. Shows the per-skill signals the Data Enrichment Sweep (cron 6) manages, and how the source-side fix handles monorepo subdirectories. Star counts shown are for illustration only.

records._note: Source resolves to a repository ROOT -> the star count is genuinely this tool's. Kept.

Source points INTO a monorepo subdirectory. Pre-fix, this inherited openclaw/openclaw's whole-repo count (~356.8k). The source-side fix (Fix B) DROPS github_stars rather than inheriting it -> field is null/absent. See docs/06.
Sibling folder in the same monorepo. Pre-fix it showed the identical inflated count -> the tell-tale 'many skills share one large value' signature the read-side guard logged.
A legitimate single-repo tool. Two Stripe skills can share one real value (4.4k) without being a bug; best_per_tool de-dups them in the leaderboards.
